description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a job named build_and_run_automated_test_scenarios_with_preinstalled_image that uses the glondu/beleniosbase-tests:20210706-1 Docker image, runs `source ~/env.sh`, `make build-debug-tool`, `make build-release-server`, creates a Python virtual environment with `python3 -m venv venv`, activates it, installs dependencies via `pip install -r requirements.txt`, and executes the Selenium scripts `python3 ./tests/selenium/test_scenario_4.py`, `python3 ./tests/selenium/test_scenario_3.py`, `python3 ./tests/selenium/test_scenario_2.py`, and `python3 ./tests/selenium/test_scenario_1.py`. Also in the test stage add a job build_and_test_with_debian_image that uses the ocaml/opam2:debian-10-ocaml-4.08 image, installs build tools and libraries with `sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq build-essential libgmp-dev libpcre3-dev pkg-config m4 libssl-dev libsqlite3-dev wget ca-certificates unzip libncurses-dev zlib1g-dev jq npm`, updates opam, runs `make build-debug-tool` and `make build-release-server`, starts the server in background with `./demo/run-server.sh &`, fetches the index page via `wget --retry-connrefused --no-check-certificate -T 30 http://localhost:8001 -O-`, echoes the output and asserts that exactly one `>Belenios` string appears, failing otherwise. Add a third test‑stage job build_and_test_with_preinstalled_image that uses the glondu/beleniosbase:20210706-1 image, sources `~/env.sh`, runs `make check` and `make build-release-server`, starts the server, fetches the index page and performs the same single‑link check. In the deploy stage add a job build_and_run_automated_test_scenarios_with_preinstalled_image_and_prepared_database that also uses glondu/beleniosbase-tests:20210706-1, runs only when the file VERSION changes, sets the variable PREPARED_DATABASE_VERSION to v0.01, downloads and extracts the prepared database tarball from the given URL, then performs the same build, virtual‑env, pip install and Selenium test steps as the first job. Finally, in the deploy stage add a job build_and_run_fuzz_tests_and_monkey_tests_with_preinstalled_image that uses the same image, runs on VERSION changes, defines several variables for email handling and server start, builds the tools, creates an empty email file, launches the server in background, creates a virtual environment, installs requirements, runs a fuzz login test with `LOGIN_MODE=local python ./tests/selenium/test_fuzz_login.py` and a monkey clicker test with `python ./tests/selenium/test_clicker_monkey.py`.
